text.title: multimodal-vui-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for multimodal-vui-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Designing dialogue flows on a phone emulator before testing on target hardware
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Emulators do not reproduce touch + voice timing, screen size constraints, or microphone quality. Test on actual device hardware before usability testing.

failure-mode.description: Writing voice prompts without defining the persona voice first
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tone inconsistency across turns destroys user trust in the product's identity. Define persona before writing a single prompt.

failure-mode.description: Agent-generated dialogue defaults to formal register regardless of persona brief
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Prompt explicitly for the target persona tone (e.g., "casual, helpful, under 12 words per turn"). Without explicit constraints, LLMs default to formal assistant register.

failure-mode.description: Agent assumes instant LLM response with no latency design
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLM response latency in a live voice chain is user-visible (1-3s). Agents must design streaming visual feedback for every turn involving an LLM call.

failure-mode.description: Agent generates a dialogue tree referencing visual card components without verifying they exist in the design system
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always cross-reference generated component types against the actual component library. Non-existent components produce broken screens.

failure-mode.description: Agent assumes high ASR accuracy in dialogue design
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ASR accuracy varies significantly by accent and environment. Designs must include disambiguation turns and robust "I didn't understand" fallbacks for all critical paths.
